articles.title: PLA Liaoning Aircraft Carrier Transits Taiwan Strait
articles.description: Chinese aircraft carrier Liaoning transited the Taiwan Strait on April 20, marking the first carrier passage since the Fujian's December 2025 transit.

articles.title: PLA Type 076 Amphibious Assault Ship Conducts Training Exercises
articles.description: The Sichuan, China's first Type 076 amphibious assault ship, set sail from Shanghai for South China Sea training missions to test onboard systems and platforms.

articles.title: Eastern Theater Command Monitors Japanese Destroyer Transit
articles.description: Eastern Theater Command deployed naval and air assets to track and monitor Japanese destroyer JS Ikazuchi's April 17 Taiwan Strait transit, maintaining effective control of the situation.

articles.title: Defense Ministry Warns Against Taiwan Independence and External Interference
articles.source: Chinese Defense Ministry Spokesman Zhang Xiaogang
articles.description: Senior Colonel Zhang Xiaogang warned "relevant countries" to abandon illusions of using Taiwan to contain China, stating the military remains on high alert to counter any external interference.

articles.title: PLA Daily Issues Warning to Japan on Taiwan Strait Militarism
articles.description: PLA's official military newspaper warned Japan that its Taiwan Strait military activities constitute more than 'grey zone' tactics and represent dangerous new militarism with unbearable consequences.

articles.title: Taiwan Ministry of Defense Monitors PLA Military Drills and Aircraft Activities
articles.description: Taiwan's MND confirmed tracking of PLA Type 076 amphibious assault ship departure from Shanghai and continued monitoring of Chinese military aircraft and naval activities around the strait.

articles.title: Taiwan Partners with France for Missile Frigate Upgrades
articles.description: Taiwan is upgrading six Kang Ding-class guided missile frigates with French military expertise, including BAE System's Type 997 ARTISAN radar to improve air defense capabilities.

articles.title: Taiwan Delays Critical Military Procurement Due to Budget Deadlock
articles.description: Taiwan's acquisition of HIMARS, M109A7 self-propelled howitzers, and TOW/Javelin ATGMs faces delays; US approved deferral of payment until May 2026 as legislative deadlock continues.
